page_content: AAAS265 Constructions of Manhood and Womanhood in the Black Community (3 Credits) Investigates the ways that African Americans are represented and constructed in public and private spheres and explores the social constructions and representations of Black manhood and womanhood from various disciplinary perspectives. Cross-listed with: WGSS265. Credit Only Granted for: WMST265, AASP298B, AAAS265, WGSS265 or AASP265. Formerly: WMST265.
